name: input-otp-controlled
visual_summary: Input-Otp-Controlled is a customizable input field with OTP (One-Time Password) verification, typically used in secure authentication flows such as login or password reset processes. It is especially suitable for applications requiring multi-factor authentication. This component combines input field and OTP verification for enhanced user experience.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-otp-controlled
Description: Input-Otp-Controlled is a customizable input field with OTP (One-Time Password) verification, typically used in secure authentication flows such as login or password reset processes. It is especially suitable for applications requiring multi-factor authentication. This component combines input field and OTP verification for enhanced user experience.
Style: e.g. rounded, boxed, outline
Interactions: e.g. focus, hover, clickable
Tags: input, otp, authentication, secure, login

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
